findings.description: Reading order disruption: footer DEQ logo/contact info and duplicated header content appear before main body content in the HTML.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the DEQ logo and contact info appear at the bottom footer, and officials' names/titles (Josh Stein, D. Reid Wilson, Sushma Masemore) appear once in the upper-left letterhead. In the HTML, the DEQ logo with full address appears above the main content, and the officials' names/titles are listed twice — once in a small header area at the top and again in larger text below the DEQ logo — before the Secretaries' Science Advisory Board heading and agenda begin.

findings.description: The header area content (officials' names, titles, state seal, and agency name) is rendered both as a full-width embedded image (alt text: 'State of North Carolina Seal and document header') AND as separate HTML text paragraphs immediately following the image. This duplicates the same content in two formats.
findings.evidence:
HTML has followed by

JOSH STEIN
Governor

,

D. REID WILSON
Secretary

, etc. The image at 612pt width captures the full header area including these names and titles, which are then repeated as text.

findings.description: The second image has generic, non-descriptive alt text 'Blank document page background' which describes a decorative page background rather than substantive content. If the image is purely decorative, it should not be included; if it is substantive, the alt text is inadequate.
findings.evidence: HTML: — This appears to be a full-page decorative background capture from PDF page 2 with no informational value.
